[2018-05-24 13:06] aacarey: watched penny arcade's stream while they were streaming, and i felt like they were complaining for the sake of complaining. i think acrimony is a good line for anya. the point is that most players are actually not supposed to know what it means (you can actually guess based on context, which is how the meaning of most words is learned). anya is a "big word" character that code-switches her personality between work and home.
[2018-05-24 13:09] aacarey: as for overall writing, the writers (there are about 4 of us in total if you consider the total history of the company) have been following prismata's writing guide, which calls for a light-hearted style. the characters are supposed to make jokes, sometimes out of nowhere, while the world is falling apart. the point is not to make a dark and dystopic world. that has been done a billion times in sci fi.
